data.description:
Repro (verified): REBAR_MCP_READONLY=TRUE -> _readonly() returns False -> the server exposes all 14 write tools while the operator believes it is read-only. Source: mcp_server.py:115-116 — membership test in ("1","true","yes") without .lower(). Note the same parse pattern is used for REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE (mcp_server.py:271-273) where the failure direction is safe (stricter), but fix both for consistency.

Fix: .strip().lower() before the membership test. RED test: parametrize TRUE/True/YES/1/yes -> all readonly.
data.title: REBAR_MCP_READONLY=TRUE (uppercase) silently disables the readonly gate
